name: Charlotte Pudding
effect: [On Play] Look at 4 cards from the top of your deck; reveal up to 1 [Sanji] or Event card and add it to your hand. Then, place the rest at the bottom of your deck in any order.

name: Hack
effect: If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, this Character gains [Blocker] and +4 cost. [On K.O.] If your Leader has the {Revolutionary Army} type, K.O. up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a base cost of 4 or less.

name: Roronoa Zoro
trigger: [Trigger] If your Leader has the {Egghead} type, rest up to 1 of your opponent's Leader or Character cards.

name: Dracule Mihawk
types: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
effect: [On Play] If you have 2 or less Characters, play up to 1 {Muggy Kingdom} type or <Slash> attribute Character card with a cost of 4 or less other than [Dracule Mihawk] from your hand rested.
